name: SCC_GetServiceParameterNumericalValue
title: SCC_GetServiceParameterNumericalValue
syntax: long SCC_GetServiceParameterNumericalValue ( long i1, long i2 )
description: Gets the numerical value of the parameter with the selected indices.
return: The numerical value of the parameter with the selected indices (see above). Use for value types boolValue, byteValue, shortValue or intValue.
